title: The Black Lake
shortDescription: A vast boiling tar pit wrapped in toxic fumes, dotted with scorching islands and sinking wooden platforms that make for perilous crossings.
atmosphere: An oppressive haze over a charcoal landscape; bubbling tar coughs up choking fumes while skeletal things hunt from below.
tips: Never touch the tar. Cross via the islands and platforms. Watch for sudden eruptions and don't chase the unreachable dunes beyond.

title: (page unavailable)
shortDescription: Source page returned HTTP 404 at fetch time; kept as a stub so cross-references resolve. Data to be filled on a re-fetch.

title: Water World
shortDescription: An abandoned aquatic theme park of four linked zones, ending in a flooded final area where aquatic creatures roam free.
atmosphere: An eerily quiet park still humming with machinery, choked with fog and disembodied announcements as dread mounts with depth.
tips: Don't trigger the corrupted video in the staff halls. Come equipped for hostile entities. Leave at once if you reach the flooded final zone.

title: Corroding Retail Outlet
shortDescription: An abandoned retail space with non-Euclidean geometry, creeping corrosive liquid, and windows showing Frontrooms imagery.
atmosphere: Empty desolate retail under partial light, dark corners and moans from above, thick with anxiety and architectural impossibility.
tips: Don't explore long — stay near the entrance. Avoid the dark. Beware the fast-spreading corrosive fluid and the silhouette entity.

title: Abyss Inc.
shortDescription: An inky void holding 33 weightless skyscrapers arranged around a central Empire State replica — HQ of the Backrooms Research Consortium.
atmosphere: An otherworldly expanse of floating office towers in absolute darkness, lit by bioluminescent creatures and the glow of live buildings.
tips: All furnishings are non-functional Styrofoam. Fire escapes link the buildings. Avoid the outer towers — frequent blackouts and dense entities.

title: Arabian Desert
shortDescription: A vast desert of scorching days and freezing nights, scattered with ancient ruins and prowled by hostile sand spirits.
atmosphere: Desolate and harsh, with violent climate swings and sandstorms that draw hostile entities out of the dunes.
tips: Shelter in ruins during temperature extremes. Avoid sandstorms or stay near oases. Carry water to fend off sand spirits.

title: The Adderwood
shortDescription: An ancient primeval forest of non-Euclidean topology, guarded by a colossal serpent that punishes harm to snakes, roamed by predatory canids.
atmosphere: Foggy by day beneath towering old trees; clear starlit nights under an oversized moon; reality shifts when unobserved.
tips: Never harm a snake or the Great Adder hunts you. Climb trees at night to escape Black Shucks. Dead tree hollows are no-clip exits.

title: The Sunset Beach
shortDescription: An infinite sandy beach in eternal sunset with a tropical forest, edible plants and luxury lodging, home to docile fauna and farming communities.
atmosphere: A serene tropical paradise frozen at golden hour: warm, threat-free and abundant — remarkably peaceful for weary wanderers.
tips: Forage Veroka Fruits (vitamins and lithium) in the forest. Trade with the Veroka Farmers. Never play dead on the beaches.

title: The Unfilled River of Phlegethon
shortDescription: An infinite WWI-style trench network where automated war machines patrol and unseen forces fatally punish any attempt to escape.
atmosphere: A desolate warzone of ceaseless gunfire, dense fog and floods, with mechanical horrors hunting through the mud-filled trenches.
tips: Hide in bunkers during bombardments. Move quietly in groups. Avoid armor that escalates the machines. Never try to leave.

title: The Moribund Highway
shortDescription: An infinite desert highway of paused vehicles and eerie silence, roamed by mysterious humans whose intentions stay unknown.
atmosphere: A silent desolate desert with frozen traffic; extreme heat and the psychological strain of isolation and uneasy human encounters.
tips: Avoid the roaming humans. Mobile homes make safe shelter. Loot vehicles for supplies but don't stay inside. Bring almond water.
